name: foundry
description: Web Component based Atomic Design System

scripts.build: npm run build -w @foundry/tokens --if-present && npm run build -w @foundry/elements --if-present && npm run build -w @foundry/icons --if-present && npm run build -w @foundry/themes --if-present && npm run build -w @foundry/storybook --if-present && npm run build -w @foundry/react-canary --if-present && npm run build -w @foundry/vue-canary --if-present
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b && npm run typecheck -w @foundry/react-canary && npm run typecheck -w @foundry/vue-canary && npm run typecheck -w @foundry/html-js-canary
scripts.lint: eslint . && npm run lint:scenario && npm run lint:cem
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:functional && npm run test:visual && npm run test:e2e
